creator: dj@djcustom.com
text: I use this as my ftp server for a client who has clients of their own, so as I create a client username and ftp folder, I also add myself to their group, using a seperate group for each client.  I am current a member of 13 groups, when I tried to add myself to the 14th, then I get remote disconnected, no error to speak of, just can't telnet or connect using samba.
